## Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `vibe ...`
2. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include any error messages or stack traces.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g., macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11]
- Node.js version: [e.g., 22.x — run `node -v`]
- pnpm version: [e.g., 9.x — run `pnpm -v`]
- FFmpeg version: [e.g., 7.x — run `ffmpeg -version`]
- VibeFrame version: [e.g., 0.27.0 — run `vibe --version`]

## CLI Output
```
Paste the full command and output here
```

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
